docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-04-2022 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-04-2022 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO APR-27-2022 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF LEEDELL MOORE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT COMMUNITY FORWARD IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY FELICIA HOUSTON (CHIEF PEOPLE OFFICER). NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-04-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-04-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF LEEDELL MOORE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT COMMUNITY FORWARD IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY FELICIA HOUSTON, CHIEF PEOPLE OFFICER. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOORE, LEEDELL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COMMUNITY FORWARD $2,700.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,775.00, PLEASE SEE ATTACHED MC-025 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
